disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Severe right-upper-abdominal pain that began roughly 45-60 minutes after a heavy, high-fat meal
trigger_question_examples: When did the pain start and what were you doing?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: It started about an hour after I had a big fatty dinner — a large steak. Around 45 minutes to an hour later this pain hit me under the right ribs.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Pain radiates from under the right ribs through to the right shoulder blade
trigger_question_examples: Where exactly is the pain, and does it move or spread anywhere?
Does the pain go through to your back or shoulder?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: It's under my right ribs and it shoots straight through to my right shoulder blade.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Marked restlessness — the patient paces and cannot find a comfortable position or lie still
trigger_question_examples: Does anything make it better or worse — is it easier to lie still or to move around?
How have you been coping with the pain?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I can't lie still at all — I keep getting up and pacing, trying to find any position that helps, but nothing does.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Significant nausea with two episodes of non-bilious vomiting
trigger_question_examples: Have you felt sick or been vomiting?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I feel really sick with it and I've thrown up twice — it was just food, no blood or anything green.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: No subjective fever and no shivering or shaking chills
trigger_question_examples: Have you felt hot, feverish, or had any shivering or shaking chills?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No, I don't feel feverish and I haven't had any shivers or chills.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: No yellowing of the skin or the whites of the eyes
trigger_question_examples: Have you or your spouse noticed any yellowing of your skin or the whites of your eyes?
Any change in the colour of your urine or stools?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No, my skin and eyes look normal to me, no yellowing.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Oral paracetamol taken about two hours ago gave minimal relief
trigger_question_examples: Have you taken anything for the pain, and did it help?
Did the paracetamol make any difference?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I took two paracetamol a couple of hours ago but it barely made any difference.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: After about three hours the pain is beginning to plateau rather than continuing to escalate
trigger_question_examples: How has the pain changed over the last few hours — getting worse, the same, or easing?
Is the pain still building, or has it started to settle at all?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: It was building up and terrible for about three hours, but in the last little while it feels like it's starting to ease off a bit.
